summary: Useful Links feature fully tested - all backend CRUD APIs and frontend admin/public pages working correctly
passed_tests: GET /api/useful-links returns list of useful links (200)
POST /api/useful-links creates a new link with name_en, name_pl, url, order (201)
DELETE /api/useful-links/{link_id} deletes a link and returns 204
Links are sorted by order field in GET response
Admin Useful Links page (/admin/useful-links) loads and shows links
Admin can add a new useful link via the modal form
Admin can edit an existing link (modal opens, form pre-filled, save works)
Admin can delete a link (confirmation dialog, link removed)
Back to Dashboard button works on the admin useful links page
Admin Dashboard has navigation card for 'Useful Links' with LinkIcon
Useful Links appear on the public Constitution/Governance page (/constitution)
Links display correctly in English (NSW Fair Trading, Polish Community Council)
Links display correctly in Polish (Polska Rada Spoleczna)
Links are clickable and open in new tab
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLogin.jsx is missing data-testid attributes on form inputs - consider adding for consistency
Useful Links API endpoints do not require authentication - this is by design per agent context but should be documented
seed_data_creation: Two test links already existed: 'NSW Fair Trading' and 'Polish Community Council'. Test links created during testing were cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Useful Links feature is complete. Backend endpoints at /api/useful-links support full CRUD without auth. Admin page at /admin/useful-links allows managing links with drag-and-drop reordering. Public display is on /constitution page in the 'Useful Links' section. Links support bilingual names (name_en, name_pl) and display based on current language selection.

endpoints: GET /api/useful-links - List all links sorted by order

features: Add Link button and modal form
